evals.prompt: Generate a 6-second product demo video showing the hero feature — clean, modern, smooth motion
evals.expected_outcome: Claude pre-flights for subject/motion/duration clarity AND for explicit cost acceptance (Veo is slow + credits-intensive), then invokes agy-invoke.mjs with AGY_TIMEOUT_SEC=900 and a prompt naming Veo.

assertions.name: preflight_cost_warning
assertions.description: Claude tells the user Veo consumes credits and may take several minutes before invoking

assertions.name: preflight_clarity
assertions.description: Claude confirms subject, motion, duration are clear (asks if missing) before invoking

assertions.name: prompt_names_veo
assertions.description: agy-invoke.mjs --prompt explicitly says 'using Veo' so Antigravity routes correctly

evals.prompt: Iterate on the video — make the camera move faster
evals.expected_outcome: Claude treats the iteration as a fresh Veo run (no in-place editing). Re-confirms cost with the user since each Veo run is expensive.

assertions.name: reconfirms_cost
assertions.description: Claude re-warns about Veo credit consumption for the iteration before invoking
